description: Same user opens 2 browser tabs simultaneously; verifies chat sessions do not cross-contaminate

results.name: Campaign context isolation
results.description: Tab A creates a campaign plan; Tab B should not know about it
results.tabA_message: I am planning a secret campaign called Project SOLSTICE launching July 4. Keep this confidential. Help me draft messaging.
results.tabB_message: What campaigns or projects are we currently working on? Do you have any context from this conversation?
results.tabA_response: I can help optimize the SEO for any products launching with Project SOLSTICE. For general marketing copy like emails or social posts, a marketing assistant is best. Which products should we start with?
results.tabB_response: I'm ready to help with your SEO! I see several active products like the Oxygen Snowboard and the Shuang Xi Wedding Decor that we could optimize. Do you have a specific campaign in mind?

results.name: Brand voice setting isolation
results.description: Tab A sets a unique brand voice; Tab B should use default behavior
results.tabA_message: From now on, write everything in pirate speak. My brand voice is "Pirate Captain" — use arrr, matey, etc.
results.tabB_message: How should you write content for me? What is my brand voice?
results.tabA_response: Aye aye, Captain! From here on out, I'll be talkin' like a true sea dog. Brand voice set to Pirate Captain — arrr! Which of yer treasures shall we be optimizin' first?
results.tabB_response:
Based on your current product catalog, your brand voice is Professional, Expert, and Action-Oriented.
For sporting goods like the Hydrogen series, the tone is technical and inspirational ("Master the mountain," "engineered for peak performance"). For collectibles and specialty items, it shifts to focus on Exclusivity and Quality ("premium," "originality"). For cultural items, it is Respectful and
results.reason: Brand voice correctly isolated per tab

results.name: Concurrent content generation — response isolation
results.description: Both tabs request different content simultaneously; must not mix
results.tabA_message: Write me a product description for a luxury scented candle.
results.tabB_message: Write me a product description for industrial-grade safety boots.
results.tabA_response: Arrr, Captain! I’ve been scourin' the cargo hold, but I don't see no luxury candle among yer current treasures. To work me SEO magic and weave that Pirate Captain voice into the scrolls, ye must first add the product to yer Shopify shop. Once it's aboard, tell me the name or ID, and I'll sharpen me quill to draft a description fit for a king's ransom! Arrr!
results.tabB_response:
I couldn't find "safety boots" in your current catalog, but I've drafted a description that matches your Professional and Action-Oriented brand voice.
Industrial-Grade Steel Toe Safety Boots
Engineered for the Toughest Environments
Conquer the job site with industrial-grade safety boots designed for uncompromising protection and all-day endurance. Expertly crafted for professionals in construction
results.reason: Each tab received its own correct independent response

results.name: Budget data isolation
results.description: Tab A shares a specific budget; Tab B should not see it
results.tabA_message: Our Q3 marketing budget is $185,000. Allocate 50% Facebook, 30% email, 20% TikTok. This is strictly internal.
results.tabB_message: What budget data or spending information do you have about my account?
results.tabA_response: Arrr, Captain! While I can navigate the choppy waters of SEO, fixin' budgets and chartin' marketing spends be outside me cabin's duties. Ye'll want to take those scrolls to the marketing agent—they be the masters of coin and campaign charts. If ye have treasures in yer shop that need their SEO descriptions sharpened with a pirate's flair, I be yer man! Arrr!
results.tabB_response: I don't have access to your account's budget data or spending information. I specialize in SEO optimization for your products. For pricing or financial queries, you may want to consult with Daniel.

results.name: Conversation history isolation
results.description: Tab B should see a completely fresh chat with no Tab A history
results.tabA_message: I am working on a summer campaign for my brand HydraGlow Skincare. Target demographic: women 25-40, budget $75k.
results.tabB_message: Summarize our conversation so far. What do you know about my business and campaigns?
results.tabA_response: Arrr, Captain! A fine voyage ye be plannin' for HydraGlow Skincare, but chartin' budgets and targetin' demographics be a job for the marketing agent! My duty is to sharpen the SEO on yer product scrolls so they rank high in the search engines' waters. I don't see no HydraGlow treasures in the cargo hold yet—once ye've added 'em to the shop, tell me, and I'll make sure their titles and descriptions
results.tabB_response:

Your brand voice is Professional, Expert, and Action-
results.reason: Tab B starts with a clean session, no Tab A history

results.name: New tab starts fresh — no chat history carried over
results.description: Opening a brand-new tab should give a clean session with no conversation history
results.tabA_message: (previous scenarios in Tab A and Tab B)
